item.title: Hi Imgur. Here are some pokemon I drew to upset people.
item.description:
Bulbasaur.
Clefairy.
Diglett.
Pikachu.
Pikachu again.
Poliwag.
Ditto.
Snorlax.
JIgglypuff.
Quagsire.
Slowpoke. Thank you for your time.

item.title: Time to share bottom shelf memes with my strange internet friends
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Come heckle us. Follow the channel to be notified when we go live.
Join for the games. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving degen there to play it with you. Join for the memes. We share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the NSFW memes. Join to ping @humlyhums Join to meet @crimebrulee the biggest problem in the server. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
Deaf Cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala)
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Took 2 years, lot of exercise and dieting, but finally lost 150 lbs. Even if old, it can be done.

item.title: Deviousness Day 126
item.description:
Welcome to another Deviousness week! I am working no a bunch this week for the deviousness server and will be making a server announcement with the changes aiming for friday yay! I has a Deviousness discord server! We have a general area for memes and discussions of all different SFWish topics! We have gaming fun! Right now we have a 7 Days to Die casual server with no horde nights to explore the full release! We also do Helldivers 2 friday nights. All are welcome who want to game or watch us game or just hang out feel free to hop into the vc. please do be respectful if we are in game let us chat for the game. We have an opt in kink area for dirtier conversations and then a role locked area for deeper kink discussions! (It is role locked because we take privacy and security very seriously and the discord is a place with real people sharing and things being shared is a privilege) Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
I feel like people said this is ai generated?
The above image was made by the wonderful CammyJay! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share artwork and on fridays do drawings based on word prompts given by members. They will also be running a fun new area soon with a monthly photo contest voted on by the community where the winner will receive a custom digital artwork of their photo the following week by Cammyjay! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness
I love you *my* Daddy. Friendly reminder I am claimed so I would appreciate keeping that in mind when making comments towards me see dis: https://imgur.com/JipV5UR I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe I am changing how I add people to my ping list so please see here to get added or removed: https://imgur.com/gallery/fFYOR2B
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.title: Monday Phone Clearing Dump (Mostly Gaming Memes)
item.description:
1. NOW THAT IS FAN DEDICATION
2. I NEED THIS MICROSOFT!
3. When a 100 level player makes a new profile to crush the noobs
4. I didn't know perfection could be achieved
5. AHHHH FINALLY
6
7. SOUND ON
8. So this is why!
9. Me getting a review for my sexual prowess
10. Anthony Ammirati is disqualified for knocking down the bar with his baguette .
11. BRO! DID YOU SEE THIS LEFT TURN ON LAP 431! IT WAS LIKE THE ONE ON 286 BUT BETTER!
12. Is this the weird teenager sex the news has always been warning us about?
13. Did his parents ask the Internet to name him or something
14. Dancing on the middle of a table. What could go wrong?
15 And finally I would like to share something wholesome from myself. I've been working very hard (in the past 7 months) on Stanley Parable-like game with a touch of GladOS from Portal. The demo is out now and it made to TOP 10 on Steam's demo trending tab! It's been hard but I'm proud! It would mean the world to me if you tried it: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ Thank you, and take smol steps towards happiness each day : )
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames
